text.message: would you leave me the 9-10 if i dont take your 6-2?
That is where i was going to go lol
But nice to get the commit from him
thats why i wanted to make a deal with u to be fair both of us
It was smart of you to offer the deal for sure
how come u didnt take the 3-10-11?
Strategic and still guaranteed my ore port left open
Always hard to place robber this early
`I had to just go for the only brick which blue had there
How is light blue never getting robbed? Lol
You guys are robbing everyone but him
And he has a massive ore advantage
if u said green yes i would solo him
He should’ve been the block anyways
Yes and when the game is more even I would but not when there is a clear leader that should be blocked
What does the 4 block do? Lol
His only restive and we are all on it stil
You keep blocked and steal me
As long as you don’t solo him I’ll solo red
blue is doing very well also
Dudeeee why are we 1 for 1 trading him
Free go get the west port
This game is over anyways haha
I would help you to extend
Come on lol talk things out guys
What else do you need to extend red?
Mehh not sure I believe that red lol
Just trying to get to another turn
I hope he wins at this point
